title: helianthemum montanum subsp. italicum
intro: Helianthemum montanum subsp. italicum, also known as Rock Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Rock Rose include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Rock Rose can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
